name: Flyte360
highlight_text: Category: Review, Feedback, and Online Reputation Management Software
description:
Flyte360 is a reputation management tool that supports 150 different websites to provide real-time updates to its customers in case something new happens. Offers various other features such as a centralized dashboard for all the reviews and eases review management at scale. 
‍

Source: Website

Features:

➡️Provides a centralized view for reviews 

➡️Offers various functionalities

➡️Sentiment analysis 

Pros:

✅Helps better the customer experience with CSAT score and responses 

✅Easily respond to reviews on Google and Facebook directly from the platform

Cons:

❌No-AI integrations

❌Offers limited features for review response tools

❌Not cost-effective in the long run

Priced at 25$ Per Month / Per Location

*Information sourced and cited through flyte360.com*
